heading: Documents not needed by departments to be turned over to Superintendent of Documents
label: 1720 Documents not needed by departments to be turned over to Superintendent of Documents
text: Public documents accumulating in the several executive departments, bureaus, and offices, not needed for official use, shall be turned over to the Superintendent of Documents annually for distribution or sale.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on 44 U.S. Code, 1964 ed., § 78 (, ).Jan. 12, 1895, ch. 23, § 6728 Stat. 611
